target: 2. Meeting with Mio
Huff… Huff…!
Huff!

(They should be around here.
Mio, where are you…!?)
Shin-chan…?
developer_comments: 女の子の声（小舟澪（ミオ））

target: Shin-chan!!
Mio!

I'm glad you're safe!
You were waiting alone?

Yeah, we were supposed to meet at the shrine path…
I've been waiting here this whole time.

But I'm really glad you're safe.
What about the area inside the shrine?

Right, that thing earlier!
What was that thing!?

So many people…
So many people from the island…
(They saw that scene too…)

Shin-chan…
What is this…?
I don't know…

But it's okay.
I'll be with you from now on.
Yeah!
By the way, Mio…
Ask about Sou
Ask about Tokiko
You didn't see Sou?

I met up with Sou right away,
and we ran here together.
But I think he was worried about Tokiko.

So, he said to forget about me
and go look for Tokiko,
because he was worried.
Tokiko wasn't with you?

Tokiko…
She was nearby for a while.

But as people were moving around,
I lost track of her.
So I sent Sou out to look for Tokiko.
…I see.

Once Sou meets up with Tokiko, he'll contact us.
Until then, should we wait here?
What is this feeling…!?

S-shin-chan!
Shadows are coming from the shrine area!
(They've spread this far…!)

We need to get away from the shrine!
Can you run, Mio?
Y-yeah, I'm fine!

Good!
Let's go…!

Huff… Huff…
Are you okay, Mio?

Yeah, I'm still okay.
I've trained a lot from swimming.
Are you okay, Shin-chan?
I'm fine.
Hey… something's weird, right?
…Yeah, it's too quiet.
(The streets look normal, but it's strange for them to be empty on festival day.)
Help me!
Shadows! Shadows are chasing me!
(They've come this far…!?)
P-please help---
They disappeared…

Mio, run!
This place is dangerous!
Y-yeah!
(Great… where's a safe place…!?)
Huff… Huff…
Shin-chan, where are we going?
(Where do I need to go…?)

(How can I even escape from those shadows?
Maybe it's impossible?)

Hey, let's calm down for a moment.
It seems there are no shadows around here.

Oh, maybe the river between the shrine and here
could be a way to cross!
There's a chance…

(It depends on how far the shadows can reach
and how many people they can consume.)

Sou hasn't called yet.
Maybe Tokiko hasn't been found.

I'd like to meet up as soon as possible.
I'll call from here.

I'll call Sou,
and Mio, you call Tokiko.
Got it.
It's not working…
It's not working here either…

(They can't leave… or maybe…
Could it be…)
(I can't believe I'm thinking this!)
Shin-chan?

They might be moving around.
Let's call again later.
Yeah…

Hey, what should we do next?
If they catch up with us again…

That's right…
The first solution that comes to mind is leaving the island.
Then, go to the harbor and take a ferry?
(Residents escaping might be crowding the harbor.)

(There are tourists who came for the festival,
and fans who came to Kaori's concert.
There are more people than usual.)

Everyone on the island is probably trying to escape,
so there's no way we could all fit on a ferry.
Yeah…
Should we leave the island or hide?
Which is better?

Okay, let's go back to Kofune first.
I'm worried about Alain too.

Right! Father!
If we're escaping, we need to take father with us!

When we get back, I'll explain the situation to Alain
and figure out what to do next.

Shin-chan, hurry!
Father is worrying!
Should I call right now?

Oh, right.
I'll call.
He's not answering…
Y-yeah…

Maybe he's cleaning up the store
or preparing for tomorrow,
and didn't notice the phone.
Ah, right.

The festival this year also has Kaori's concert,
but he said he's going back to the store
to prepare for tomorrow.
He said he'll open the store as usual tomorrow…
…What's going to happen now?
(I, too, was just thinking I could get through tomorrow.)

(I was naive.
I thought it would be safe if there were many people,
but I was wrong.)
(Also, Kaori might have been consumed by the shadows…)
(If I die, maybe I can loop and start over!)

(No, wait.
Even if a loop occurs,
it doesn't mean I can go back to the time I want.)

(In the first loop, I came on the ferry.
In the second, Mio picked me up at the harbor.
There's also a possibility it could happen after the festival starts.)

(Before that, is it even certain I can loop?
There might be conditions I haven't noticed yet,
and I might not meet them now.)

(No good…
There's still too little information
to risk my life.)

Shin-chan, are you okay?
You're all pale.

Ah, yeah… I'm fine.
Nothing's wrong.

(If I die and no loop happens,
I won't be able to protect Mio.)

(I was entrusted with Mio by Ushio.
I can't act recklessly.)
(I'll set aside the loop possibility for now.)

(If I really have no choice…
The loop will be my last resort.)
